To invoke the standard operating system behavior for transliterating Chinese text, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction/transliterateChinese(forText:)] in your implementation of this method.

# transliterateChinese(_:)

**Instance Method**

Converts the selected text between traditional and simplified Chinese.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func transliterateChinese(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Overview

To invoke the standard operating system behavior for transliterating Chinese text, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction/transliterateChinese(forText:)] in your implementation of this method.

When you change the selected text in your implementation of this method, notify the operating system by calling [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInputDelegate/selectionWillChange(for:)] and [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInputDelegate/selectionDidChange(for:)].

## Translating and transliterating text

- **translate(_:)**: Presents a translation of the selected text.
